scripts.postinstall: node ./decorate-angular-cli.js && ngcc --properties es2015 browser module main
scripts.test:regiment:cat1: BUILD_TARGET=e2e JEST_HTML_REPORTER_INCLUDE_FAILURE_MSG=true JEST_HTML_REPORTER_OUTPUT_PATH='./cat1-test-report.html' npx jest --ci './libs/charge-gpt/src/lib/services/filters-identifiers/__test__/request-identifier-cat1.service.regiments.spec.ts' -c './libs/charge-gpt/jest.config.ts' -t 'Regiment: Request Ident Cat1 Service' --json --outputFile=cat1-output.json --reporters='jest-html-reporter'
